# Vendor / TiePie Support Files

Place TiePie HS3 support files here only if your license allows redistribution.

Expected local files:

```text
hs3.dll
hs3f8.hex
hs3f12.hex
```

If these files are not allowed to be uploaded to GitHub, keep them out of the repository and tell users to install the official TiePie software/driver package or copy the files locally.

Recommended safe approach:

1. Do not commit vendor DLL/HEX files.
2. Add them locally on the test machine.
3. Keep the paths expected by the LabVIEW Call Library Function Nodes.
